title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 326.304 - Attorney general or other legal counsel to represent board in certain proceedings
text:
326.304.  Attorney general or other legal counsel to represent board in certain proceedings. — At all proceedings for the enforcement of these or any other provisions of this chapter, the board shall, in its discretion as it deems necessary, select the attorney general or one of his or her designated assistants, or other legal counsel to appear and represent the board at each stage of the proceeding or trial until its conclusion.
(L. 2001 H.B. 567)
